title: Magnetic stimulation methods and devices for therapeutic treatments
abstract: A magnetic stimulation device, method of operating the magnetic stimulation device and methods of use are described. The magnetic stimulation device reaches high repetition rates and/or high values of magnetic flux density. The magnetic stimulation device provides various treatments at the same time and a plurality of treatment effects are achieved.
claims:
Claims 1. A magnetic stimulation device which produces a time-varying magnetic field for treatment, wherein the device comprises: a connection to an energy source, a switching device, a magnetic field generating device, an energy storage device; wherein the magnetic field generating device comprises insulated wires; and a voltage drop in the energy storage device between successive amplitudes output from the energy storage device is not higher than 21 %. 2. The device of claim 1 where a voltage drop in the energy storage device between the successive amplitudes is not higher than 14 %. 3. The device of claim 1 where a voltage drop in the energy storage device between the successive amplitudes is not higher than 7 %. 4. The device of claim 1 wherein the switching device is connected in parallel to the magnetic field generating device and the energy source. 5. The device of claim 1 wherein the magnetic field generating device is flexibly attached to casing. 6. The device of claim 4 having no protective resistors between the connection to the energy source and the energy storage device. 7. The device of claim 4 including a blower on one side of the magnetic field generating device and positioned to blow air across the magnetic field generating device in a direction parallel to a plane of the magnetic field generating device. 8. The device of claim 1 wherein the insulated wires have diameter lower than 0.5 mm. 

 The device of claim 4 where the device enables treatment or successive treatments with peak to peak magnetic flux density of at least 1.5 T and with single magnetic pulses repeated at a repetition rate above 50 Hz. The device of claim 9 wherein the device enables repetition rates above 100 Hz with a magnetic flux density causing at least partial contraction of a muscle of a patient. The device of claim 1 where the device enables treatment or successive treatments with peak to peak magnetic flux density of at least 1.5 T at repetition rates above 70 Hz. The device of claim 1 , wherein the device further comprises at least one blower and a casing; wherein the magnetic field generating device and the casing are arranged in a manner that fluid can flow in-between and wherein the magnetic field generating device is cooled by fluid flow over at least upper and lower sides of the magnetic field generating device. The device of claim 12 wherein the blower is arranged on a circumference of the magnetic field generating device. The device of claim 12 wherein the magnetic field generating device is a flat type magnetic field generating device. The device of claim 12 wherein the magnetic field generating device comprises insulated wires. The device of claim 12 wherein the magnetic field generating device is attached to the casing by at least one fastening point.

The device of claim 6 wherein the fastening point is flexible. The device of claim 16 wherein the fastening point is rigid. The device of claim 12 wherein spacing between the magnetic field generating device and the casing of applicator is at least 0.1 mm . The device of claim 12 further including an outlet on the upper side of the casing. The device of claim 12 wherein the fluid is air. The device of claim 22 wherein the fluid is cooled air. A magnetic stimulation device producing a time-varying magnetic field for treatment, wherein the device comprises: a connection to an energy source, a switching device, a magnetic field generating device producing time-varying magnetic field, and an energy storage device; wherein the switching device is connected in parallel to the energy source.
